ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newspaper where the article was published */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the newspaper where the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number where the article was published */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the original source of the article */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been cited */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was imported into the database */,
  "import_user_id" INTEGER /* User who imported the article */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the article was published */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the article was published */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the article was published */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of article (e.g., news, announcement, editorial) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_import_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newspapers" (
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newspaper */,
  "newspaper_title" TEXT /* Title of the newspaper */,
  "newspaper_city" TEXT /* City where the newspaper was published */,
  "newspaper_province" TEXT /* Province where the newspaper was published */,
  "newspaper_country" TEXT /* Country where the newspaper was published */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the newspaper was founded */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "circulation" INTEGER /* Circulation of the newspaper */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Publication frequency (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the newspaper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the keyword belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword extracted from the article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the keyword to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the entity belongs to */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity mentioned in the article */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the sentiment analysis result belongs to */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "cited_article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article being cited */,
  "citing_article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article that cites another article */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_permissions" (
  "user_role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_import_logs" (
  "import_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the import */,
  "import_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_import_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_logs" (
  "export_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export log */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the export */,
  "export_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the exported data (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_logs_export_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("export_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
